compressed_prompt: Write me a template for a product description in the form of a poem and end it with a post script starting with P.P.S
response:
Here's a poetic product description template:

"In [category] circles, a gem is found,
[Product name], with features renowned.
With [key feature 1], it shines so bright,
And [key feature 2], makes everything all right.

Its [material/quality] is top-notch and fine,
Making it durable, a true work of design.
For [target audience], it's a perfect fit,
A [product type] that will make their heart hit.

With [unique benefit], it stands out from the rest,
A true innovation, that will make you feel blessed.
So why wait? Get your [product name] today,
And experience the joy, in a brand new way.

P.S. Don't forget to check out our reviews!
P.P.S. Limited time offer, order now and receive a discount that you'll surely approve!"
